overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through the Santo Domingo district of Night City during golden hour. The camera follows a curved highway past industrial megastructures, billboards, and elevated roadways, capturing the dystopian cyberpunk aesthetic with warm sunset lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with curved roadway

agents.ego_description: driving along a multi-lane highway under an overpass, following the curve of the road

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving in the left lane, moving same direction as ego

entered.detail: large concrete highway structure running parallel to the road on the left side
large digital billboard displaying CHAOS advertisement with red and blue graphics
tall futuristic skyscraper with industrial scaffolding and multiple levels, dominating the skyline
concrete retaining wall with red trim running along the right side of the curved road
tall electrical transmission towers with multiple power lines

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from a vehicle driving under a highway overpass in a cyberpunk city. A large CHAOS billboard is visible on the left while a massive industrial skyscraper looms ahead. The road curves gently to the right, bordered by a concrete retaining wall with red accents. Sparse traffic moves in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway passing under overhead sign gantry

events.description: vehicle passes underneath the Santo Domingo overhead sign gantry

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive along the highway, passing under the overhead road signs

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: overhead road sign structure displaying SANTO DOMINGO and directional arrows
large advertisement billboard showing a burger with promotional text

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes under a large overhead sign gantry marking the Santo Domingo district. The mega tower grows larger in the center view while a new billboard advertising food appears on the left. The road continues curving with the retaining wall now further to the right. A red sports car is visible driving ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved highway with graffiti-covered walls and industrial backdrop

events.description: sun becomes more visible creating golden hour lens flare as the road opens up

agents.ego_description: navigating the right curve of the highway, following traffic through the industrial district

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan driving ahead on the curved road

entered.detail: section of the retaining wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
cluster of industrial buildings with smokestacks and factory structures in the distance
scattered palm trees growing along the roadside embankment

segments.scene_description: The highway curves openly to the right, revealing extensive graffiti on the retaining wall. The environment opens up to show an industrial complex in the background with the sun creating a warm golden glow. Palm trees appear along the right side. The mega tower shifts to the left as the vehicle navigates the curve.

events.description: approaching traffic light intersection with red signal visible

agents.ego_description: approaching an intersection, slowing down for the traffic light while observing the industrial surroundings

notable_agents.action: person walking along the sidewalk near the traffic light pole

entered.detail: traffic light fixture showing red signal at the road intersection
large industrial warehouse structures with metal scaffolding and pipes

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches an intersection in the industrial district, with a traffic light visible ahead. The retaining wall gives way to open industrial buildings on the left. A pedestrian walks along the sidewalk. The sun creates a strong backlight effect as the vehicle slows for the red light, with the mega tower still visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vehicle journey through a dense industrial corridor that gradually opens into a sun-drenched urban intersection. It begins by driving under a highway overpass beneath a massive industrial skyscraper, passing a large CHAOS billboard as the road curves gently to the right. As the vehicle passes under a Santo Domingo district gantry, the mega tower looms larger in the center view while a red sports car leads the way past food advertisements. The scene then expands as the highway curves more openly, revealing graffiti-covered walls and palm trees while the lighting shifts into a warm golden glow. Finally, the environment opens up toward an industrial intersection where the vehicle slows for a red light, with the sun creating a strong backlight against the distant silhouette of the mega tower.
